question: What instruction is written on the masking tape attached to the wall while the red level rests on the wooden plank? A. ATTACH WITH TEMPORARY SCREWS B. DRILL PILOT HOLES FOR BOLTS C. FIND STUDS D. LUMBER RACK SIDE VIEW

What action is the person wearing black gloves and a black short-sleeved shirt performing on the vertical wooden board? A. sanding B. hammering C. drilling D. painting
Describe the key steps shown in the video for the lumber rack project.
canonical_answer: At 0s, construction materials are stored against walls in a garage; at 4s, a hand flips through a notebook showing lumber rack sketches; at 8s, a man wearing a grey shirt mounts a wooden shelving unit on the wall; at 10s, he stands on a ladder to work on the upper section; at 12s, he positions a long wooden plank horizontally against the unit.

question: Has the man wearing a black t-shirt started drilling the wooden board to the wall yet?

From a lumber rack plan to a wooden shelving unit installation C. From a painting schedule to a wall mural creation D. From a ski storage plan to a vertical rack installation
